changes_from_v2: Add B2 hazard-adjusted ILS columns: expected_decay_price, ils_dl_adj, b2_method
B1 T_event second-pass validation: 57.8% exact match, 68.9% within 24h across 50 stratified markets
B7 anchor robustness recomputed on 88-market post-fix sample
B5 parametric bootstrap KS added: exp p=0.224, weibull p=0.043, lognormal p=0.083
B3 median bootstrap CIs for all 6 category×period cells
changes_from_v1: Fix edge filter: p_open threshold changed from |p_open-0.5|>0.4 to >=0.4; 2 markets with p_open=0.9 correctly excluded (n_ils: 90→88)
Fix exclusion_reason for ils_compute_error: now includes exception type (all 230 are PriceLookupError)
Fix FFIC localization: market_id_prefix lookup and prefix matching (was returning NaN market_ids in v1)
Bootstrap tz_convert fix (applied in v1 run but documented here)
